title: hordeum murinum subsp. montanum
intro: Hordeum murinum subsp. montanum, also known as mountain barley, is a subspecies of the wild barley plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of mountain barley include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
